name: prison cell
hints: A prison cell with a dead explorer, rubbish, and a closed portal.
LOO RUB to search through the rubbish for useful items. LOO EXP to examine the explorer.
The explorer may have useful items. The portal might open somehow.
Search the rubbish for hidden items. The explorer's body may have tools. S=ledge (20), W=revolving cavern (18).
notes: Prison cell with dead explorer (may have items), rubbish pile (search for items), and closed portal. S=ledge (20), W=revolving cavern (18).
